verdicts.subject: managed-session product projection
verdicts.verdict: raw screenshot capture remains Runs/Tracing-only; product projection requires sanitized screenshot preview ref.

verdicts.subject: operator take-over
verdicts.verdict: take-over is represented as daemon-owned control state, not GUI-only state.

verdicts.subject: manual login gate
verdicts.verdict: login-gated browser state projects as waiting_for_user before any agent continuation.
